label: Fixed
items: Snoozed harvest tasks no longer regenerate a duplicate ghost behind the scenes, which means snoozing the same task twice no longer fails with a duplicate-key error and the old snoozed task no longer reappears as overdue while a hidden copy still exists in the database.

Internally: the task engine now builds its ghost-suppression index from every materialised task with a blueprint, regardless of whether the task is currently hidden by a snooze or out-of-window filter.
